M0650_CU_DRESS_UPR (M0650) Current Ability to Dress Upper Body Current ability to dress upper body. 00 = Able to get clothes out of closets and drawers, put them on and remove them from the upper body without assistance
01 = Able to dress upper body without assistance if clothing is laid out or handed to the patient
02 = Someone must help the patient put on upper body clothing
03 = Patient depends entirely upon another person to dress the upper body
UK = Unknown. CHAR 2 x x
M0650_PR_DRESS_UPR
